_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the per-section src/ files; CI regenerates this file.

items: If a session can expire, users must be warned before it happens and given a way to extend or save their work (WCAG 2.2.1).
Timeout warnings must be announced via an ARIA live region — annotate for engineering.
Do not set session timeouts shorter than 20 hours unless required for security.
